fields.label: Calc
fields.options:
Calc A — Forecast
Calc B — SO-driven
Calc SO
Calc Action
fields.description: Which calculation produced this row. Calc A runs from the Sales Projection forecast; Calc B re-checks against pending Sales Orders after Calc A commits. Calc SO is the standalone Sales Order Shortage automation (Shortage Cover — scans all pending SOs across items × warehouses, action-type aware). Calc Action is the Shortage Action automation (auto-trigger per Item Minimum Manufacture row when Auto on Shortage or Auto on Max Level fires).

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Created
Created (PP)
Created (MR)
Skipped - No Shortage
Skipped - No BOM
Skipped - No Demand
Skipped - PP Exists
Skipped - MR Exists
Skipped - No Warehouse
Error
Error - See Log

fields.label: SPOW (Projection qty)
fields.description: Sales projection of specific warehouse — from Sales Projection child table at run time.

fields.label: PRVSO (Prev-month pending SO)
fields.description: Sum of pending Sales Order qty whose transaction_date < current month start.

fields.label: CURRSO (Current-month pending SO)
fields.description: Sum of pending Sales Order qty whose transaction_date is in the current month.

fields.label: CURRALSO (Current-month all SO incl. completed)
fields.description: Sum of ALL Sales Order qty (completed + incomplete) whose transaction_date is in the current month.

fields.label: ITMWO (Pending Work Order qty)
fields.description: Sum of qty − produced_qty across open Work Orders for this item × warehouse.

fields.label: ITMWSTK (Stock at warehouse)
fields.description: tabBin.actual_qty for the item × warehouse at the moment of the run.

fields.label: MINMFG (Min mfg/purchase floor in stock UOM)
fields.description: Resolved from Item.custom_minimum_manufacture for this warehouse, converted to stock UOM.

fields.label: Qty of Shortage (raw formula output)
fields.description: The unfloored shortage from the formula. Negative or zero ⇒ Skipped - No Shortage.

fields.label: Work Orders Created (parent + sub-assembly)
fields.description: Comma-separated list of Work Order names linked to the Production Plan.

fields.label: Formula / Audit Note
fields.description: Full formula breakdown that produced the decision — auditors and the production team read this to verify why a PP was or was not created.
